kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: xpath://li[@class='post-160 product type-product status-publish has-post-thumbnail product_cat-selenium product_tag-ruby product_tag-selenium has-post-title no-post-date has-post-category has-post-tag has-post-comment has-post-author first instock downloadable taxable shipping-taxable purchasable product-type-simple']//a[@class='button product_type_simple add_to_cart_button ajax_add_to_cart'][normalize-space()='Add to basket']
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath://li[@class='post-160 product type-product status-publish has-post-thumbnail product_cat-selenium product_tag-ruby product_tag-selenium has-post-title no-post-date has-post-category has-post-tag has-post-comment has-post-author first instock downloadable taxable shipping-taxable purchasable product-type-simple']//a[@class='button product_type_simple add_to_cart_button ajax_add_to_cart'][normalize-space()='Add to basket']'.
kw.arg: xpath://li[@class='post-160 product type-product status-publish has-post-thumbnail product_cat-selenium product_tag-ruby product_tag-selenium has-post-title no-post-date has-post-category has-post-tag has-post-comment has-post-author first instock downloadable taxable shipping-taxable purchasable product-type-simple']//a[@class='button product_type_simple add_to_cart_button ajax_add_to_cart'][normalize-space()='Add to basket']
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
